name: PORTED
handler: return {id: 'P' + i * 1000 + j + 1,title: game[0],url: group.path + game[1] + '/',img: '/github/gn-math/covers/' + game[2] + '.png',type:'PORTS'}

name: SIGMA
handler: return {id: 'S' + i * 1000 + j + 1,title: game[0],url: group.path + game[1] + '/',img: group.path + game[1] + '/' + (game[2] || group.image),type:group.name}

name: RANDOM_2
handler: return {id: 'R' + i * 1000 + j + 1, title: game[0].startsWith('Cl') ? game[0].slice(2) : game[0], url: group.path + game[1], img: '', type: 'RANDOM_2'}

name: RANDOM_1
handler: return {id: 'H' + i * 1000 + j + 1,title: game[0],url: group.path + game[1] + '/',img: group.path + game[1] + '/' + (game[2] || group.image),type:'RANDOM_1'}
